title: OmniFormatter Java / Kotlin / Groovy / Scala Configuration Schema
description: Merged formatting configuration for JVM languages. All fields optional.

braceStyle.description: Opening brace placement. Java/Kotlin convention is K&R (same line).

statementTerminator.description: Java/Groovy require semicolons; Kotlin makes them optional.

java__wildcardImportThreshold.description: [Java] Number of same-package imports before switching to wildcard.

kotlin__trailingComma.description: [Kotlin] Add trailing commas in multi-line function params and collections.

kotlin__functionBodyStyle.description: [Kotlin] Prefer expression body fun f() = x when single-line.

kotlin__nullSafety.description: [Kotlin] Enforce null-safety: prefer ? types, ?: Elvis, avoid !! where possible.
